extracurriculars.description: Selected involvement beyond formal work experience.

items.description: Contributed to cybersecurity projects and participated in CTF competitions, developing secure web applications and learning penetration testing techniques.
Built full-stack applications for student initiatives, collaborating with designers and other developers to create impactful solutions for the campus community.
Developed technology solutions for non-profit organizations, focusing on creating accessible and user-friendly platforms to amplify social good initiatives.
Worked on machine learning projects and AI research initiatives, exploring neural networks and natural language processing applications.
Organized academic workshops, exam review sessions, and mentorship programs to support CS students in their coursework and career development.
Managed the society's budget, secured sponsorships, and oversaw financial planning for events and initiatives serving over 1,000 CS students.
